title.purpose: Component titles and structured content group headings.

body.purpose: Primary reading copy at a calm, high-legibility rhythm.

label.purpose: Metadata and compact UI labels without defaulting to mono styling.

shadows.name: focus-lift
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus and explicit interaction emphasis.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Selective hover depth for interactive panels or project previews.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, and small reveal transitions.

motion.name: duration-medium
motion.purpose: Section and container transitions with reduced-motion fallback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action control: compact, calm, and clearly authoritative.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.56 0.11 142); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 14px 22px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 0 0 0 6px rgba(82,130,94,0.35); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action treatment for quieter calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); padding: 14px 22px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 142); border-radius: 8px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(0.56 0.11 142); color: oklch(0.56 0.11 142); background: oklch(0.97 0.01 142); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 0 0 0 6px rgba(82,130,94,0.35); }

components.name: Project Preview Card
components.description: A flat-by-default portfolio preview with strong title hierarchy and quiet metadata.
components.html:
Case study

Building a quieter portfolio system

A focused redesign that improved hierarchy, contrast, and storytelling without falling into portfolio cliches.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 142); color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 142); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 280ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(22,32,26,0.08); border-color: rgba(82,130,94,0.25); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-kicker { margin: 0 0 12px; color: oklch(0.52 0.015 152); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 12px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-card-copy { margin: 0; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.52 0.015 152); text-wrap: pretty; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A quiet, high-contrast input field that uses focus rings rather than loud fill changes.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 142); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; font: inherit; line-height: 1.4; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.52 0.015 152); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.56 0.11 142); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 0 0 0 6px rgba(82,130,94,0.35); }

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: A compact navigation rhythm with one strong active state and no ornamental separators.
components.html: WorkAboutContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 18px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(0.52 0.015 152); text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 0 0 0 6px rgba(82,130,94,0.35); border-radius: 6px; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: oklch(0.23 0.02 152); }

narrative.overview: This system is built for a portfolio where trust is earned by precision, not by spectacle. The visual language should feel composed on first contact: strong hierarchy, generous white space, and a rare but disciplined use of color that makes the work feel considered instead of trendy. The reference mood is a pure white workspace with a moss-colored signature and a small ember accent that appears only when it matters. The current implementation in code is still a stock Payload starter, so this document defines the intended system the project should converge toward. It rejects generic SaaS scaffolding, metrics-led heroes, default gradients, editorial-serif portfolio mannerisms, and decorative flourishes that make the page feel styled before it feels trustworthy.
keyCharacteristics: Clear, high-contrast hierarchy with little visual noise
Pure white architecture with restrained tonal surfaces
Moss as the primary brand signal, ember as the selective counterpoint
Sans-first typography with confidence carried by scale and spacing
Flat-by-default surfaces that rely on borders and tone before shadow

rules.name: The One Accent At A Time Rule
rules.body: Moss and ember should almost never compete in the same local component. If a module uses ember, moss steps back to text or outline duty.

rules.name: The No Costume Typography Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a serif, mono, or novelty face just to signal taste. Hierarchy must come from scale, spacing, and weight first.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: If a surface is not being interacted with, it should usually be separated by tone or border, not by ambient shadow.

dos: Do keep body text at oklch(0.23 0.02 152) on oklch(1 0 0) or equivalent contrast-safe pairings.
Do use moss as the dominant action color and keep ember rare enough to feel intentional.
Do let spacing and type scale establish authority before adding panels, borders, or effects.
Do keep long-form text to a readable measure of roughly 65ch to 75ch.
Do use reduced-motion fallbacks for all non-trivial transitions and entrances.
donts: Don't ship generic SaaS patterns like metric heroes, templated gradient headers, or interchangeable startup CTA blocks.
Don't drift into editorial-serif portfolio signals, magazine minimalism, or art-school presentation tropes.
Don't use side-stripe accents, gradient text, decorative glass cards, or repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows.
Don't place moss and ember at equal visual weight inside the same local module unless contrast of meaning demands it.
Don't default to ambient shadows for every card or section; flat-by-default is part of the system's credibility.
